eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; Clark, WA; at 4:16 PM on JUL 8, 2019 Effective until 6:16 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an Emergency Alert System administrative message issued by Clackamas County in Oregon
